metadata.budget_zero_contract: PA and PN with probe_budget=0 must be byte-identical to phase-1 PD canonical rows on the fresh 29900-29909 engineering seed block.
metadata.implementation_contract: probe_arm=off returns through the published phase-1 predictive/default path; probe_budget=0 returns through predictive.run_one before probe candidate construction, isolated probe RNG, or recovery-ledger code runs.
metadata.mode: engineering equivalence; not a scientific outcome

outcome_branches.FAIL: Any missing row, field mismatch, budget-zero mismatch, leakage hit, evaluation-oracle hit, or seed-policy violation; stop line-11 phase 2 and report.
outcome_branches.INCONCLUSIVE: Only for harness/prereg infrastructure failure before an engineering comparison is possible.
outcome_branches.PASS: All selected headline rows exactly equal the committed J-G1 snapshot and PA/PN probe_budget=0 exactly equal phase-1 PD rows; proceed to J-N9 PREREG draft.

metadata.question: Do active-probing neutral paths preserve published behavior and phase-1 PD exactly?
metadata.what_was_not_shown: This gate does not evaluate PA/PN scientific benefit, safety, probe selection quality, or recovery under positive probe budgets.

threshold_change_rationale.boundary_policy15: The boundary policies are inherited from committed J-G1/J-N8a headline equivalence cells.
threshold_change_rationale.budget_zero_arms: Both active probe arms must reduce to the same phase-1 PD path when probe_budget=0.
threshold_change_rationale.budget_zero_pressures: Budget-zero identity is checked at default pressure 1.0 and one active-grid pressure 1.2 to cover default and stressed PD paths without using scientific seeds.
threshold_change_rationale.budget_zero_seeds: Fresh engineering seed block 29900-29909 is disjoint from wave-6 27000/28000 and wave-7 scientific 29000-29079 blocks, preserving guard #9 seed-block disjointness without exceptions.
threshold_change_rationale.budget_zero_worlds: Budget-zero identity is an engineering invariant sampled on representative W6 mutation-corridor and W2 capture worlds; it is not a scientific pressure-ceiling estimate.
threshold_change_rationale.headline_seeds: Engineering off-path equivalence intentionally reuses the committed J-G1 deterministic seed block 16000-16079 to compare the same headline cells; this is not the J-N9 scientific seed block.
threshold_change_rationale.required_exact_equal: Engineering equivalence remains exact equality; no statistical margin is introduced.
threshold_change_rationale.validation_policy15: The validation policies are inherited from committed J-G1/J-N8a headline equivalence cells.
threshold_change_rationale.worlds: The headline replay worlds are inherited from committed J-G1/J-N8a equivalence cells for exact snapshot comparison.
